resources.string:
CodeAssist 已基于全新端内构建系统重构。新版本采用独立项目配置，旧版本工程不兼容，无法自动打开。
立即备份你的工程为.zip压缩文件——这样您的源文件将安全无虞，并且你可以重新添加他们在新项目中。

共享匿名性能运行数据，帮助我们定位卡顿、崩溃问题并针对性修复。
我们会收集以下信息：您的应用版本和设备型号、构建、索引和代码补全所需时间、构建成功/失败情况以及已清理的崩溃报告。
我们绝不会收集您的代码、文件或项目名称、您使用的功能，或任何可以识别您身份的信息。您可以在项目打开时随时在 “更多” 选项中更改此设置。
无需笔记本电脑，即可编写、浏览和构建端到端的 Android 和 Java 项目。
能够识别你代码的自动补全功能。
Eclipse JDT 可在您输入时提供精确的、排名靠前的建议（带有签名和文档）。
可以通过代码编程，也可以通过积木式编程
可将任意Java文件转换为联动积木视图，该视图与原始源码逐字节实时同步。
在设备上构建真实的APK安装包
解析、编译、dex、打包、签名——然后直接安装到您的手机上。
单一输入框可检索命令、文件与代码符号，全局快捷操作核心入口。
Kotlin 自动补全功能目前处于测试的beta阶段
完整Kotlin代码补全功能，优化出与Java一致流畅、分级排序的使用体验。
支持Android XML标签、属性、资源代码补全，并实时语法校验。
你的项目文件存放于真实文件夹中
项目文件保存在应用存储空间中，您可以使用任何文件管理器打开它们——拖放图标、布局或素材，或者在电脑上进行编辑。无需特殊权限，没有任何隐藏内容。
基于 Jetpack Compose 全新重构
CodeAssist 运行更快、操作更流畅，全界面原生搭载 Jetpack Compose，支持 @Preview 实时预览。
打开现有项目或创建一个新的项目
Android应用、Java控制台程序、代码库…
导入该项目工程包需要更高版本的CodeAssist!
无法导入该项目工程包!
CodeAssist 无法识别此文件!请选择 .caproj 格式项目工程包进行导入
将本项目打包为 .caproj 文件，可分享给任意用户
打包时纳入已下载的库文件，便可离线导入、构建项目；此举会增大文件体积
你的项目包已生成完毕
可在Discord内交流、寻求帮助、分享你开发的项目
这是我用业余时间开发的，坚持对每个人免费。如果它帮助到了你，赞助项目或者收藏项目仓库便是对我极大的支持
应用内可能会展示广告，但你可以随时关闭
译文：可通过GitHub赞助渠道支持本项目开发
还没有项目哦~新建项目即可开始开发
部分功能尚未完善，后续可能调整。欢迎反馈问题，告诉我们缺失或异常的功能。
可使用文件管理器打开该目录管理项目（存放在Projects目录的旧版项目也包含在内），添加图标、资源文件，或是在电脑端编辑文件。
“%1$s” 及其所有文件将被永久删除，无法撤销!要执行删除操作吗？

plurals.name: recovered_projects
plurals.item: 已从旧版本恢复 %1$d 个项目
已从旧版本恢复 %1$d 个项目

resources.string: 这类项目基于Gradle构建，将以有限兼容模式打开；部分功能可能无法使用，需要重新补充依赖后才能正常构建。原始文件会安全保存在存储目录内。
该文件暂不支持转换为积木视图
点击插槽即可编辑，点击内嵌子块进入下层编辑
在导航栏选择文件即可开始编辑
Press Run to build & run this module.
Git integration. Staging, diffs, commit & push is on the roadmap.
Android platform sources (%1$s) aren't installed. It is needed for android.* parameter names & docs.
Templates and sample projects to start from
Explore isn't available in this build.
Community projects will land here once submissions open.
Open Explore's sample projects to read and run.
Ask questions and share what you build.
Building the code index so completions and error checks work instantly.
Downloading the Compose libraries, this happens once.
Indexing… the preview starts in a moment.
Edit the code above and watch it re-render
Indexing… suggestions and checks improve in a moment
Nice work! Keep the momentum going.
Type at least 2 characters to search.
Indexing… symbols appear as the index builds.
Run a command, jump to a file or symbol…
A build or program is still running. Stop it and start this run instead?

CodeAssist can run builds and your program in a separate, isolated process and show a progress notification while they run. It keeps Android from stopping the build when you switch away, and lets you follow progress. Allow notifications to turn this on.
Builds will run in the app

Without notification permission, builds run inside CodeAssist instead of a separate process, and you won\'t see build progress notifications. You can turn notifications on anytime in Settings, under Build Runtime.
Enter to rename '%1$s', Esc to cancel
Use / for nested folders. .java/.kt scaffold a class; .xml a root element; anything else is empty.
This permanently removes the folder and everything inside it. This can't be undone.
This permanently removes the file. This can't be undone.
An unexpected error occurred. The app has kept running.
All symbol & completion indexes are up to date.
Restart to apply your plugin changes.
Create or import the keystores you sign release builds with. They're stored once and shared across projects; assign one to a build type in a module's Signing tab.
No keystores yet. Create or import one to sign release builds.
Couldn't read the certificate (password may have changed).
Password (≥ 6 chars; protects the store and key)

Download SDK platform sources and JDK sources so the editor can show javadoc, parameter names, and go-to-source into the SDK. Downloads continue in the background, so you can leave this screen and keep working.
Sources available, android.* and java.* docs are on.
No JDK sources found. Download a JDK that bundles them:
No packages. Check your connection, then Refresh.
Where libraries resolve from. Built-in repos can't be removed.
No dependencies declared. Tap Add to download one.
not resolved. Check the version/repository or re-resolve
Search a BOM, or type group:name:version, e.g. androidx.compose:compose-bom:…
Search Maven Central, or type group:name[:version]…
No other modules available to depend on.
Type at least 2 characters to search, or a full group:name[:version].
Add versionless, version from a platform
Add this version (group found by search)
Copied into the module's libs/ folder
No local jars/aars found. Import one into the project, or open this on a device to pick a file.
Remove %1$s from %2$s? Its resolved classpath will be detached from the module.
Transitive group:name entries to drop (either side may be *), comma/space separated.
Couldn't load versions, type one above.
Enter a valid http(s) URL that isn't already added.
No modules. Tap + to add one.
Build features apply to Android modules only.
Turn build features on per module. Enabling one adds the dependencies it needs.
Signing applies to Android modules only.
Choose the keystore that signs each build type. An unassigned type signs with the debug keystore.
Packaging options apply to Android modules only.
How Java resources and native libraries contributed by more than one input (your module, sub-modules, AARs, libraries) are combined into the APK.
Patterns are APK-relative globs: ** crosses folders, * stays within one, a leading / is optional.
Native libraries are packaged as-is (no NDK stripping on device).
Drop every file whose path matches.
Keep the first match; silently drop later duplicates.
Concatenate duplicates instead of dropping them.
No keystores yet. Create one in the Keystore Manager to sign release builds.
Remove '%1$s' from the project? Its files are left on disk; other modules' dependencies on it are dropped.
The main class the Run button launches for this module. Leave blank to auto-detect.
These files are referenced by a build type but don't exist, so R8 skips them when minify is on.
Each language keeps its own profile
A preset starting point; changing any option below switches to Custom
Reformat the file each time you save it
Kotlin formatting normalizes indentation, tabs, blank lines, and inline spacing. Brace placement and line wrapping follow the code as written.
Extra indent for a wrapped line
Wrap comment text at the line width
Open a project to preview formatting.
